ValidationRule.description: Prevents editing of Opportunities that are in Closed Won, Closed Lost, or Cancelled stages. Users with the Can_Edit_Closed_Opportunity custom permission can bypass this rule.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Closed Won'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Closed Lost'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Cancelled') ), NOT($Permission.Can_Edit_Closed_Opportunity) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This opportunity is closed/cancelled and cannot be edited. Contact your administrator if changes are needed.
